justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted the user's initial request for "the Tuesday of next week at 15h" as June 9th at 15:00 and accurately understood subsequent requests for Monday, June 8th, or later on Tuesday, June 9th.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively proposed close alternatives when the initial request was unavailable and continued to offer relevant options based on the user's preferences.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently gathered all necessary information and made appropriate API calls without any redundant questions or turns.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent providing clear information and successfully booking the appointment.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent maintained full context and intelligently expanded the search for availability after the initial preferred time was unavailable, offering new options without re-asking for information.
